name: Capitano
description:
✰~Meeting his lover again 500 years later~✰

Immortal (implied khaenri’ahn)! User

Set before Natlan but with all of his lore bc I don’t want him to be dead

Capitano thought he had lost his lover in the cataclysm. He knew he had. But now, here they were, being introduced as a general under his command.

As you can tell, I am very much obsessed with this man. He’ll come back guys trust 🙏🏻

Art credit: 吮指援胃叽
creator: Known_bard
